an1.21:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when undeveloped, is so untamed [*akammaniyaṁ*] as this mind [*citta*].
an1.21:1.2: An undeveloped mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, is untamed [*akammaniyaṁ*]."
an1.22:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when developed, is so tamed [*kammaniyaṁ*] as this mind [*citta*].
an1.22:1.2: A developed mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, is tamed [*kammaniyaṁ*]."
an1.23:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when undeveloped, leads to such great harm as this mind [*citta*].
an1.23:1.2: An undeveloped mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, leads to great harm."
an1.24:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when developed, leads to such great benefit as this mind [*citta*].
an1.24:1.2: A developed mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, leads to great benefit."
an1.25:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when undeveloped and unmanifested, leads to such great harm as this mind [*citta*].
an1.25:1.2: An undeveloped and unmanifested mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, leads to great harm."
an1.26:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when developed and manifested, leads to such great benefit as this mind [*citta*].
an1.26:1.2: A developed and manifested mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, leads to great benefit."
an1.27:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when undeveloped and uncultivated, leads to such great harm as this mind [*citta*].
an1.27:1.2: An undeveloped and uncultivated mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, leads to great harm."
an1.28:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when developed and cultivated, leads to such great benefit as this mind [*citta*].
an1.28:1.2: A developed and cultivated mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, leads to great benefit."
an1.29:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when undeveloped and uncultivated, brings such suffering as this mind [*citta*].
an1.29:1.2: An undeveloped and uncultivated mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, brings suffering."
an1.30:1.1: “I do not see, bhikkhus, any other single thing that, when developed and cultivated, brings such happiness as this mind [*citta*].
an1.30:1.2: A developed and cultivated mind [*citta*], bhikkhus, brings happiness."
an1.30:1.4: The Chapter on the Untamed is the third.
